arts.ttl: Why Amorim’s response to Marcus Rashford was PERFECT for Man Utd
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim’s response to the Marcus Rashford crisis underlined the fact that he is the perfect figurehead for Manchester United . Rashford, however, brought the first real challenge of the Portuguese’s time at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: McTominay: “Manchester United is my life, Napoli an opportunity to seize”
arts.sum: Napoli midfielder Scott McTominay recently spoke to the BBC, reflecting on his journey from Manchester United to Serie A. The Scottish international opened up about his decision to leave his boyhood club and embrace a new challenge in Italy. arts.sum: But it is a new life, it's not a disciplinary thing, it's the performance in training, the performance in game and then I have to change, to choose players." Both Garnacho and Rashford were left out of the matchday squad for the Premier League win over Manchester City on Sunday and they were instructed to train at Carrington instead .
